created_for: v0.1.35 weapon + gameplay prop arsenal staging

assets.name: Pressure Pistol Final Component Pack
assets.lod: LOD0 component mesh, LOD1 merge rivets/coils, LOD2 silhouette receiver+barrel
gates: Readable pistol silhouette at 8m pickup scale
Gauge/lamp remain visible in first-person crop
No collider generated from decorative coils

assets.name: Steam Scattergun Final Component Pack
assets.lod: LOD0 full, LOD1 remove rivets/gauge needles, LOD2 single barrel block
gates: Pump/stock grip volumes fit hand sockets
Soot pass does not hide muzzle direction
assets.collision: 5 primitives: stock, receiver, barrel cluster, tank, pump
assets.role: heavy shotgun/scattergun viewmodel and wall display

assets.name: Pressure Cartridge Family
assets.lod: LOD0 individual cartridges, LOD1 single rack strip
gates: Red high-pressure cartridge distinct from standard
Pickup trigger larger than visual mesh
assets.collision: capsule per cartridge or one pickup trigger box
assets.role: ammo pickups, cabinet contents, UI icon source

assets.name: Wall Weapon Display Frame
assets.lod: LOD0 full frame, LOD1 remove labels/lamps
gates: Green/red gameplay labels can be swapped by state
Backplate stays behind level wall collision
assets.collision: single thin box for backplate plus optional hooks
assets.role: armory wall prop and weapon pickup framing

assets.name: Ammo Cabinet / Vending Prop
assets.lod: LOD0 windows/pipes/gauge, LOD1 no side pipes, LOD2 cabinet shell
gates: Dispense slot aligns to pickup spawn socket
State colors map green=stocked amber=low red=empty
